applicant_full_name.label: Full Name
applicant_full_name.description: Full name of the RTI applicant (used in templates where explicitly named)

applicant_pin_code.label: PIN Code

validation.message: PIN code must contain only numbers

applicant_pin_code.description: PIN code of the applicant's address

public_authority_name.description: Name of the concerned public authority

validation.message: PIN code must contain only numbers

public_authority_address_pin_code.description: PIN code of the public authority address

pin_code.label: PIN Code

validation.message: PIN code must contain only numbers

pin_code.description: PIN code used in templates that do not distinguish applicant vs authority

fee_mode.label: RTI Fee Payment Mode
fee_mode.description: Mode of payment of RTI application fee

fee_details.label: RTI Fee Payment Details

validation.message: Payment details should be between 0 and 100 characters

fee_details.description: Transaction ID or other fee payment reference

submission_date.label: RTI Submission Date
submission_date.description: Date on which the RTI application is generated/submitted

application_date.label: Application Date
application_date.description: Date on which the original application was submitted

application_date_full.label: RTI Application Date
application_date_full.description: Date shown at the end of the RTI application

submission_month.label: Submission Month
submission_month.description: Month in which documents or applications were submitted

designation.label: Designation
designation.description: Designation of the applicant at the time of service

staff_number.label: Staff / PF Number

validation.message: Staff number should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

staff_number.description: Staff number or Provident Fund number

date_of_superannuation.label: Date of Superannuation
date_of_superannuation.description: Date of retirement of the applicant

retirement_unit.label: Retirement Unit / Office

validation.message: Retirement unit should be between 3 and 200 characters

retirement_unit.description: Office or unit from which the applicant retired

submission_office.label: Office of Submission
submission_office.description: Office where the application or documents were submitted

application_id.label: Application ID

validation.message: Application ID should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

application_id.description: Unique application ID for the scheme or service

validation.message: Registration ID should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

representation_date.label: Representation Date
representation_date.description: Date of representation submitted by the applicant

family_head_name.label: Head of Family Name
family_head_name.description: Name of the head of the family

validation.message: Application number should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

passport_office_name.label: Regional Passport Office
passport_office_name.description: Name of the Regional Passport Office

verification_completion_date.label: Document Verification Completion Date
verification_completion_date.description: Date on which document verification was completed

application_submission_date.label: Passport Application Submission Date
application_submission_date.description: Date on which passport application was submitted

validation.message: Plot number should contain only letters, numbers, spaces, periods, hyphens, and slashes

city_survey_number.label: City Survey Number

validation.message: Survey number should contain only letters, numbers, spaces, periods, hyphens, and slashes

city_survey_number.description: City survey number of the property

validation.message: Ward number should contain only letters, numbers, spaces, periods, hyphens, and slashes

employment_notice_number.label: Employment Notice Number and Date
employment_notice_number.description: Employment notice reference number and date

post_name.label: Post Name
post_name.description: Name of the post applied for

Roll number should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

govt_office_name.label: Government Office Name
govt_office_name.description: Name of the government office where complaint was filed

complaint_date.label: Date of Complaint
complaint_date.description: Date on which the complaint/grievance was filed

validation.message: Complaint number should contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and slashes

accounts_officer_name.label: Accounts Officer Name
accounts_officer_name.description: Name of the Accounts Officer for RTI fee payment

payable_location.label: Payable Location
payable_location.description: Location where the RTI fee IPO is payable

lpg_distributor_name.label: LPG Distributor / Agency Name
lpg_distributor_name.description: Name of the LPG distributor or agency (Indane/HP/BP)

lpg_distributor_address.label: LPG Distributor Address
lpg_distributor_address.description: Address of the LPG distributor or agency

agency_name.description: Name of agency (Indane/HP/BP) for LPG distribution

filing_date.label: RTI Filing Date
filing_date.description: Date on which RTI application is being filed
